cast.name: 朱莉·迈尔克斯 Julie Michaels

director.name: 迈克尔·费尔舍 Michael Felsher

this_title: Hearts of Darkness: The Making of The Final Friday
introduction: In 1993, Jason Voorhees went to hell in what is one of the most polarizing installments in the franchise. Hearts of Darkness: The Making of the Final Friday features the story of writer / director Adam Marcus. Love it or hate it, go behind the scenes for a never-before-seen look at the 9th installment of one of the most iconic franchises in the horror genre.
chinese_title: Hearts of Darkness: The Making of The Final Friday
